lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Can you come and help me, [player name]? I've got a problem with some graves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll help with your graves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm busy.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: You have to help me, [player name]! I've put the wrong coffins into these graves.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: I need you to pick up the coffin from each grave, see who's inside it, and bury it in the grave with the correct gravestone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've finished!

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: That's a good attempt, but it's just not right. Try looking in the coffins to learn who is in them, and read the gravestones to see who is supposed to be buried there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right, I'll give it another shot.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Wonderful! That's taken care of them. I'll take you back, and give you your reward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me what I'm supposed to do.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: I need you to pick up the coffin from each grave, see who's inside it, and bury it in the grave with the correct gravestone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to leave now.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: In that case, I'll take you back to where I found you.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Welcome back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? But how am I still here?

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: You died, and now you are in a graveyard.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Where did you think you would go?

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Sorry, I need help from [player name].

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Hello, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Please help me, [player name].

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: I need your help, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Can I borrow you for a minute, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Leo
lines.text: Maybe later.
